final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic key-art movie poster for a sci-fi thriller about AI awakening.

Style/medium: cinematic key-art movie poster, cyberpunk aesthetic, Blade Runner meets Ex Machina visual language, professional compositing and rendering quality
Composition: vertical centered portrait orientation, subject face occupying upper two-thirds, title reserved in bottom third, direct eye contact with viewer, strong visual impact
Subject: half-human half-cyborg female face, left side delicate human features with natural brown eye, right side exposed precision circuit boards and metallic skeletal structure, seamless fusion along central vertical axis
Scene/backdrop: massive digital matrix space, countless green code raining down from above, immersive technological void
Lighting/mood: dramatic chiaroscuro with cold blue and green tones, one glowing blue mechanical eye as focal point, mysterious and suspenseful atmosphere
Color palette: cold blue as dominant base, toxic green code as accent, metallic silver highlights, controlled warm brown in human eye as contrast anchor
Materials/textures: human skin with natural pores and subtle warmth, brushed aluminum and copper circuitry, fiber optic glow, matte black carbon fiber
Text (verbatim): ""
Constraints: title area must remain empty in bottom third; face must be perfectly symmetrical along vertical axis; human and mechanical halves must blend seamlessly at center line
Avoid: 8K stuffer text, watermark, asymmetrical face split, visible seams between human and machine parts, warm daylight tones, cluttered background competing with subject
